findings.claim: ADR-001's Context treats the path `proxmoxtf/resource/` as the current location of SDKv2 resources.
findings.consequence: If `proxmoxtf/resource/` no longer exists in the repository, the ADR's factual premise about where legacy resources live has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001's Context treats the path `fwprovider/` as the current location of Plugin Framework resources.
findings.consequence: If `fwprovider/` no longer exists, the ADR's premise about the current framework resource location has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001's Context treats `tf6muxserver` as a currently-used named dependency (multiplexer) in the provider binary.
findings.consequence: If `tf6muxserver` is no longer a dependency of the provider, the ADR's architectural premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001's Decision (Migration Priority) treats the path `proxmoxtf/resource/vm` as the current location of the VM SDKv2 resource.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the migration-priority premise pointing at it has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001's Decision (Migration Priority) treats the path `proxmoxtf/resource/container` as the current location of the Container SDKv2 resource.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the migration-priority premise pointing at it has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-002's Decision treats `proxmox/api/client.go` as the current base HTTP client file.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the layered-client-architecture premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-002's Decision treats `proxmox/client.go` as the current top-level client file.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the layered-client-architecture premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-002's Decision uses `proxmox/cluster/client.go` as a path presented as an example of the existing domain-client pattern.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer resolves, the illustrative Layer 3 example premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-002's Decision uses `proxmox/cluster/sdn/zones/client.go` as a path presented as an example of the existing sub-domain-client pattern.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer resolves, the illustrative Layer 4 example premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-003's Decision (Domain Hierarchy) treats `fwprovider/` as the current root directory for resource packages.
findings.consequence: If `fwprovider/` no longer exists, the domain-hierarchy premise this ADR documents has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-003's Decision treats `fwprovider/test/` as the current location of shared test utilities.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the test-colocation premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-003's Decision treats `fwprovider/provider.go` as the current registration point for resources and data sources.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists, the registration premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-003's Decision treats `proxmox/` as the current top-level directory containing corresponding API client packages.

citations.quote: corresponding client package in `proxmox/` following the same domain hierarchy

findings.consequence: If `proxmox/` no longer exists as described, the corresponding-client premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats the `terraform-plugin-framework-validators` module as a currently-used named dependency for standard validators.
findings.consequence: If this module is no longer a dependency, the validators premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats `fwprovider/validators/` as the current location of project-specific validators.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the validators-location premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats `fwprovider/attribute/` as the current location of the `attribute.ResourceID()` helper and related conversion helpers.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the attribute-helper location premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats `fwprovider/types/stringset/` as the current package providing the `stringset.Value` custom type.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the custom-types premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats `fwprovider/types/` as the current package providing custom attribute types like `customtypes.IPAddrValue`.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the custom-types premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-004's Decision treats `fwprovider/nodes/vm/{cpu,vga,rng}` as the current schema packages carrying inherited `Optional+Computed` fields pending conformance work.
findings.consequence: If these paths no longer exist or no longer match this description, the conformance-tracking premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-005's Decision treats `proxmox/nodes/tasks/task_result.go` as the current file implementing `tasks.TaskResult.AddDiags`.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the task-diagnostics premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-005's Decision treats `proxmox/retry/` as the current package centralizing retry logic.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the retry-policy premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-005's Decision treats `proxmox/api/client.go` as the current source of the not-found error-joining behavior for HTTP 500 responses.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer contains this logic or no longer exists at this path, the delete-predicate-trap premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-006's Decision treats `fwprovider/cluster/sdn/vnet/` as an example of the current test-colocation file layout.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the illustrative file-placement premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-006's Decision treats `fwprovider/test/` as the current package providing `test.InitEnvironment(t)`.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the test-environment-setup premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-006's Decision treats `../../.dev/DEBUGGING.md` as the current location of the mitmproxy debug-API workflow documentation.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this relative path, the API-verification cross-reference premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-007's Decision treats `fwprovider/migration/` as the current package providing `migration.PrefixMoveState()`.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the state-move-migration premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-007's Decision treats `proxmoxtf/` as the current location of feature-frozen SDK resources.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the Phase 3 migration-scope premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-008's Context treats `fwprovider/nodes/vm/` as the current parent directory for the existing `cpu`, `vga`, `rng`, `cdrom`, `memory` sub-packages.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the sub-block contract's foundational premise about existing sub-packages has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-008's Decision treats `fwprovider/nodes/vm/cpu/` as the current reference implementation for the single-nested sub-package family.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the single-nested reference-implementation premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-008's Decision treats `fwprovider/nodes/vm/cdrom/` as the current reference implementation for the map-keyed sub-package family.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the map-keyed reference-implementation premise has decayed.
